# Outstride — Founder Coaching

> Ben Jones is a founder-turned-coach who helps ambitious startup founders scale from pre-seed to Series C. Outstride OS is his practical operating system for company, founder and human layers.

## About

- [Homepage](https://www.outstride.co/): Founder coaching, services, FAQ and contact
- [Testimonials](https://www.outstride.co/testimonials/): What founders say about working with Ben
- [Referrals](https://www.outstride.co/referrals/): How to refer a founder

## Outstride OS

- [OS Home](https://www.outstride.co/os/): The operating system for scaling founders
- [Capabilities](https://www.outstride.co/os/capabilities/): 26 founder capabilities across company, founder and human layers
- [Tools](https://www.outstride.co/os/tools/): Diagnostics, frameworks, templates and rhythms
- [Three Layers](https://www.outstride.co/os/layers/): Company, founder and human
- [The Four D's](https://www.outstride.co/os/process/): Diagnose, define, design, deliver

## Machine-readable context

- [Full site context JSON](https://www.outstride.co/json): Complete structured dump of homepage, OS taxonomy, tools, capabilities and content blocks — updated on every build

## Contact

- Email: ben@outstride.co
- Website: https://www.outstride.co/#contact
